name: Aetherium Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: Aetherium Acquisition Corp. Unit consists of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Aetherium Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on target businesses in the new media, digital health, fintech, e-commerce and technology industries.
